P1_Instructional_Schema_Driven.definition: predefined workflow templates ReAct Thought-Action-Observation tool schemas domain guidelines procedural schema literature review -> hypothesis formulation -> experimental design -> validation
P1_Instructional_Schema_Driven.running_example: Battery Schema Persona battery materials expert Procedural Schema 1 Crystal Design -> 2 DFT -> 3 Synthesis -> 4 Testing Tool Inventory VASP XRD_Simulator Autolab_API Constraints Avoid Co target >4V

P3_Deliberative_Reflective.definition: self-evaluation mechanisms iterative plan refinement critique revision cycles multi-turn generate->critique alternating meta-prompts Evaluate plan logical consistency feasibility Identify failure modes revise
P3_Deliberative_Reflective.running_example: Generate Initial Li-rich oxide Reflect flaws Cycles 480 Safety O2 risk Revise Mg-doping Al2O3 coating Reflect 550 Converged Yes Final

P4_Search_Based.definition: exploration over plan spaces generating evaluating multiple candidates selecting optimal Tree-of-Thought MCTS beam search sequential decision under uncertainty expanding promising branches pruning low-quality
P4_Search_Based.mechanism: search trees nodes partial plans edges extensions heuristic scoring learned value models quantum-chemical feedback VLM figure quality
P4_Search_Based.running_example: ROOT Cathode >200 variants scores 0.5 0.7 0.65 0.82 0.75 DFT E_cal -3.1 eV Cycles 520 max reward path

P5_Role_Interactive_MultiAgent.definition: distribute planning across collaborative ensembles specialized functions proposal flaw feasibility feedback team dynamics iterative discussion consensus-building tournament debate multi-round voting generation-reflection paired specialized critics
